title: Verify atomic statement-scope registration
preconditions: An active owned account and registered provider-neutral Evidence Record, including valid statement rows and invalid kind/account/date variants.
steps: Invoke ledger.reconciliation.scope.register with one approved account, inclusive period, opaque manifest reference, and complete statement-row evidence set; inspect the public result and durable scope membership; replay with the same key and another key; then vary manifest, membership, Evidence Kind, account, date, and crash point.
expected: One completed immutable scope and all memberships commit atomically; evidence IDs are ordered; identical same-key and cross-key replay return the original scope with zero duplicate effects; changed account-period content and invalid evidence return stable errors with zero scope, membership, or consumed invalid-request idempotency effect.
